nasb.text: Praise the Lord! How blessed is the man who fears the Lord, Who greatly delights in His commandments.

esv.text: Praise the Lord! Blessed is the man who fears the Lord, who greatly delights in his commandments!

cnv.text: 你們要讚美耶和華。 敬畏耶和華、熱愛他的誡命的， 這人是有福的。

ccb.text: 你们要赞美耶和华！ 敬畏耶和华、乐于遵行祂命令的人有福了！

csbs.text: 哈利路亚！ 敬畏耶和华、极其喜悦他诫命的， 是蒙福的！
